metadata.description: Workflow and documentation skills for structured software development: feature lifecycle (diagnose, research, brainstorm, discovery, prd, technical-design, plan, beads, execute, review, compound) and documentation lifecycle (audit, write, ADR)

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Complete feature development workflow with scope-based routing: init (project scaffold and CLAUDE.md setup), research (deep investigation), brainstorm (problem framing with scope classifier), discovery (domain-aware requirements for complex features), prd (tiered product requirements with resolution-tracked open questions), technical-design (feature-first architecture with sibling cross-refs), plan (implementation plans with companion docs), beads (intent-based tasks with /simplify review beads), execute (sub-agent implementation with upstream verification), review (parallel agent code review with alignment audits), compound (structured learning capture), diagnose (systematic root cause analysis). Requires br (beads-rust) CLI for task management.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Documentation lifecycle skills: audit existing docs for gaps and staleness (docs:audit), generate and update documentation from templates (docs:write), record architectural decisions using MADR (docs:adr). Supports Diataxis framework, AI-optimization files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, llms.txt), architecture docs (C4, arc42), and project files (README, CONTRIBUTING).
